title: Space/set: description field has no length limit
description: jmap.rs space_set create and update: description accepted as any string with no length cap. name uses canonicalize_display_name (32 char limit) but description has none. A client can write multi-MB description to the space table. Fix: cap at a reasonable length in both create and update paths.
close_reason: Fixed in round 34: body cap, forbidden error, unknown patch paths, description limit
